final_prompt.prompt:
Create a WeChat Official Account article cover image for a fragrance product launch (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "高级质感风" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Aesop brand visual heritage, Kinfolk magazine editorial photography, Cereal magazine minimalist layout; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered composition with the title as the dominant focal point
Subject: must include the fragrance product launch context
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an autumn atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs an autumn direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" (main title, large, centered), "秋意染染 时光留香" (subtitle, secondary)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; title must be the dominant focal point per user requirement
Avoid:
